notes:
### v1.1.9

#### Added
- Discord access control is now available for MeowGang-only app access through a whitelist JSON.
- Discord login now uses Authorization Code with PKCE, opening Discord in the user's browser and returning through a local callback.
- Approved Discord users are remembered locally in `meowgang_auth.txt` and rechecked against the current whitelist on startup.
- Approved users now see a welcome screen with their whitelist display name and a Proceed button before the app opens.
- System Settings now includes a Show Welcome Screen toggle for users who want to skip the welcome UI.

#### Improved
- The Discord access screen now uses the LOA Tracker icon/title and clearer MeowGang-only messaging.
- Denied users now see the Not approved by our Meowtator message with the configured Tenor animation and a local fallback.
- The approved username display was moved from the app header to the bottom of the sidebar with smaller centered text.
- Whitelist display names are now used for welcome messaging when provided.

#### Fixed
- Discord OAuth URLs now open through the default browser on Windows instead of being interpreted by PowerShell or File Explorer.
- Missing or empty `meowgang_auth.txt` files now return users to Log in with Discord instead of showing the denied-account flow.

#### Changed
- README setup and privacy notes now document Discord auth configuration, supported whitelist formats, and the local auth cache file.

## Installation
Download `loatracker_1.1.9_x64-setup.exe` below.
